sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kei aa ding tam Khang Suangpi
Nangma sung kong beel ding hi
Tha khat luang khia “si le tui”
Mawh ki phel thuap na hi hen

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka khut in ka sep na tawh
Hahkat den zo mah leng zong
Tawp lo khi tui luang hang zong
Nangmah bek in Nong hon zo

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Puan nei lo Nangmah’n Nong guan
Ci mawh heh pih na kong zuan
Nong sil ke’h ka si ding hi

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ka nuntak lai hi ta leh
Theih loh gam ka kah ciang zong
Thu khenna mai kong tun’ dong
Nang ma sung hong beel sak aw
